scripts.build: npm run build -w @replayio/mcp-lab-vite && npm run build -w @replayio/mcp-lab-next && npm run build -w @replayio/mcp-lab-tanstack-start
scripts.ci:record: npm run ci:record:vite && npm run ci:record:next && npm run ci:record:tanstack-start
scripts.record:all: npm run record:all -w @replayio/mcp-lab-vite && npm run record:all -w @replayio/mcp-lab-next && npm run record:all -w @replayio/mcp-lab-tanstack-start
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @replayio/mcp-lab-core && npm run typecheck -w @replayio/mcp-lab-vite && npm run typecheck -w @replayio/mcp-lab-next && npm run typecheck -w @replayio/mcp-lab-tanstack-start
scripts.test: npm run test -w @replayio/mcp-lab-vite && npm run test -w @replayio/mcp-lab-next && npm run test -w @replayio/mcp-lab-tanstack-start
scripts.validate:manifests: npm run validate:manifest -w @replayio/mcp-lab-vite && npm run validate:manifest -w @replayio/mcp-lab-next && npm run validate:manifest -w @replayio/mcp-lab-tanstack-start
